customers_say: Customers find this electronic lock to be of excellent quality, simple to configure and use, and appreciate its nice appearance. Moreover, the functionality receives positive feedback, with one customer noting the technician spent adequate time explaining how it works. They also value the service, with one mentioning the technician's excellent service, and consider it good value for money.

reviews.author: Shivi Gandhi
reviews.title: Good product, good installation
reviews.body: Venkat ji (the installation technician) very patiently explained and helped set up the lock. Thank you :)

reviews.author: Raja Guru
reviews.title: Godrej Digital lock
reviews.body: It’s working good , and the customer service also available at any time, with in 3 working days they will come and solve the problems, It’s safe and secure for home main door, recommend to buy this digital lock..

reviews.author: Bharat
reviews.title: Good product
reviews.body: Ravindra is best in job , fast and accurate installation , fast service , demo good
